source: A graphical user interface to map folders to virtual drives (see SUBST command). This can be done for the current user and for all users at Windows startup.
• Update Windows App SDK and NuGet packages.
A graphical user interface to map folders to virtual drives (see SUBST command).
View a list of all real and virtual drives on your computer.
Map an existing folder to a new virtual drive.
Support for a dark app theme included.
View all available drives in a grid view.
View all available drives in a tiled view.
